Row.Text: Mycenaean Unique Quarter. Created by constructing the Megaron and the Cyclopean Wall in the same District. +1[icon:YIELD_FOOD] Food, [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production, and [icon:YIELD_GOLD] Gold on [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortifications in this Settlement. +2 [icon:YIELD_FOOD]Food in [icon:YIELD_TOWNS]Towns.

Mycenaean Unique Quarter. Created by constructing the Megaron and the Cyclopean Wall in the same District. +1[icon:YIELD_FOOD] Food, [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production, and [icon:YIELD_GOLD] Gold on [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortifications in this Settlement. +2 [icon:YIELD_FOOD]Food in [icon:YIELD_TOWNS]Towns.
Mycenaean Unique Happiness Building. +3 [icon:YIELD_HAPPINESS] Happiness. +1 [icon:YIELD_GOLD] Gold adjacency for Quarters and Wonders. Ageless.

Mycenaean Unique Production Building and [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortification. +3 [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production. +2 [icon:YIELD_DIPLOMACY] Influence if placed on [icon:CITY_UNIMPROVED] Rough Terrain. +1 [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production adjacency for Wonders. Ageless.
+2 [icon:YIELD_DIPLOMACY] Influence if placed on [icon:CITY_UNIMPROVED] Rough Terrain.[n]Mycenaean Unique Building.
